parameters.query:
SELECT 
    batch.id, 
    batch.c_keywords as keywords,
    city.c_name AS city, 
    city.c_state AS state, 
    country.c_name AS country
FROM app_fd_lead_batch AS batch
JOIN app_fd_city AS city 
    ON batch.c_city LIKE CONCAT('%', city.id::text, '%')
JOIN app_fd_country AS country 
    ON country.id = city.c_country::uuid
where batch.c_is_active='true'

select id, c_place_id as place_id from 
app_fd_lead where c_place_id=$1
